title: QWORK® 2.0 Litre Glass Jug with Lid, Heat Resistant Borosilicate Glass Carafe, for Hot/Cold Water
features: Material: Made of high quality borosilicate glass. Thick glass has strong impact resistance and high and low temperature resistance. It is safe to use in refrigerators and stoves.
Large capacity: 2L Glass Jug for Coffee, Brew Tea, Milk, Juice, Cocktails for the Whole Family or Entertaining Guests
Easy to clean: The large opening on the top makes it easy for your hands to reach the bottom, making it very convenient to clean the inside
Smooth spout: the water is concentrated without splashing, and can be poured smoothly. The small hole filter can easily filter tea and scented tea, and the widened handle is easy to grasp.
description: Product Description About Qwork Save more, get more No ads, just low prices and good stuff. We keep it simple and make sure you get the best for less. Choose Qwork, where your money works harder for you. See More
